productDisplayName: Puma Men Evo Black Casual Shoes
description: When stylishly casual is the mood, slip into these awesome Evo shoes from puma that come with an attractive low-profile design and look great when teamed with jeans and t-shirts.It comes with an attractive &ldquo clever bag&rdquo .UpperLeather upper for durability and protectionPerforations on the sides and has a mesh tongue for enhanced breathable comfortLace-ups for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra freshnessBrand name printed on the tongue and cat logo behind collarCup-sole for added durabilityCushioned footbed for all day wear  MidsoleEVA midsole for greater shock absorption  OutsoleNon-slip rubber outsole for greater tractionPivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree movementFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet  Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
